title: Wire CLI scheduler events into events.jsonl
description: Update CLI scheduler reporting so every reporter callback records enriched event payloads to storage, pass storage into `CliSchedulerReporter`, and emit scheduler cycle start/completion audit events from `command_run`.
acceptance_criteria: `CliSchedulerReporter.__init__` accepts `storage: RepositoryStorage` and its construction sites pass storage through.
Reporter callbacks write `bead_started`, `worktree_ready`, `bead_completed`, `bead_blocked`, `bead_failed`, `bead_deferred`, and `lease_expired` events with the payload fields required by the spec.
`command_run` records `scheduler_cycle_started` before the scheduler loop and `scheduler_cycle_completed` after the loop with the requested summary fields.
Existing console output behavior remains intact alongside event recording.
